text_block_list.text:
The Spring Fan Fest is finally here! While the
sports events are getting everyone excited,
Curren Chan is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! I'm gonna record. Everyone say the
magic words! Ready... go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Yep! Perfect! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you sooo much! I'm gonna have it enlarged
and hang it in the prettiest part of my house!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad you like it! ♪ I hope you'll keep
cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text: Of course!

As always, Curren Chan is taking good care of her
fans.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're just realizing that now?! I've always
been like this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... Or were you just sad because I left you all
alone?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You can be so cute sometimes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You can be so cute sometimes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to give you too much
attention going forward, though.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've got a lot of races coming up... And with even
more fans, I'll probably be stopped a lot more
too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! This is my chance!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There are so many people here. We've gotta tell
them all about the Cutie ♪ Derby!

True to her word, Curren Chan reaches out to
everyone she can.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Forcing her way through the mud without any
hesitation, Curren Chan wins the "Push Ahead!
Dirt and Mud Race!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ewww! I'm covered in ooze!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text:
She's cute even when she's muddy! How does she
do it?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I've been seeing a lot of her lately. She's really
got some guts.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whew... How do I look, Big Bro? Did I get it all
off?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whew... How do I look, Big Sis? Did I get it all
off?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, good. Time for a little break...

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text: Oh! Curren Chan! I found you!

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text:
My crew and I have come from abroad. Can I
have a little bit of your time?

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text:
We'd like to cover this Cutie ♪ Derby we've been
hearing about, if you don't mind!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, of course! ♪ Ask me anything you want!

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Then we'll see you again at the Sprinters Stakes!
Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! I'm fine! I didn't think they'd come all the
way from overseas to cover my Cutie ♪ Derby!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So even people in other countries are interested...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to think about my next race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Obviously! Just take a look around you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Obviously! Just take a look around you.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Squeal! Daiwa Scarlet! Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! Look! Dober and the vice-president both
look so coooool!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Sure, there are a lot of people watching me, but
I still get overshadowed at events like this with so
many popular runners around.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I need to run in another race where I can stand
out...

Curren Chan is deep in thought. She seems to be
even more aware of people's gazes than usual.
And so, she chooses...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And that's the end of the scavenger hunt! The first
one to cross the finish line is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ I'm number one!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan finished the "find the booth with
your uniform and change" task in an astounding
one minute and six seconds!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Cute Curren Chaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe I shouldn't have chosen the scavenger
hunt.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sure, everyone seemed pretty happy, but I felt like it was a bit predictable.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Since the scavenger hunt is such a popular race, I
figured I could really dazzle the crowd and get
them more hyped than they were.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess I need to add an element of surprise
to my next plan...

Curren Chan falls deep into thought... and then
looks as if she's found a hint for what to do next.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run in a long-distance marathon!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I already know what you're thinking. You don't
think I can finish a long-distance race, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I already know what you're thinking. You don't
think I can finish a long-distance race, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's just why no one will expect it. I'm sure it'll
catch everyone's attention.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And if I win... don't you think the reaction will be
something else?

She's right. It'll certainly be a hot topic if she wins.
But there will definitely be runners participating
who excel at long-distance.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Don't worry. We've already come so far
together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Don't worry. We've already come so far
together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I don't just plan on running because it's
unexpected. I'm gonna run to win.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now it's time for the marathon finale! The
first runner to cross the finish line is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I ended up losing. After I talked it up so much
too... Pretty lame, huh? Haha.
As proof...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chaaaaan! You ran great today! All the
way until the end!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
She's a sprinter, isn't she? I should look her up
later and see how she usually runs.
choice_data_list:
You ran your heart out, and now everyone's
looking at you.

You ran your heart out, and now everyone's
looking at you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Haha! ♪ I guess today was a huge success then!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
A loss is a loss, and I'm so totally not cute right
now. But... I think everyone felt how serious I was.
choice_data_list: Was that all part of your plan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I dunno, maybe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... you are the one who told me I look good when I'm working hard!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... you are the one who told me I look good when I'm working hard!

Even though the odds were stacked against her,
it's clear she still gave it her all. The applause for
her goes on for quite some time.
